title: 17-year-old from Jansenville prepares for nationals
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"JANSENVILLE NEWS - Endinako Jola, a 17-year-old Grade 10 learner of Gcinubuzwe Combined School in Jansenville, has officially qualified for the National School Athletics Championships that will take place in Pietermaritzburg from 3 to 5 April.","html":"JANSENVILLE NEWS - Endinako Jola, a 17-year-old Grade 10 learner of Gcinubuzwe Combined School in Jansenville, has officially qualified for the National School Athletics Championships that will take place in Pietermaritzburg from 3 to 5 April."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Endinako, a dedicated member of the Sinalithemba Athletics Club, has been in exceptional form this season, securing victories across multiple events."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His journey to nationals began with dominant performances in Graaff-Reinet and Westbourne, Gqeberha, where he won the 3 000m, 1 500m and 800m races.","html":"His journey to nationals began with dominant performances in Graaff-Reinet and Westbourne, Gqeberha, where he won the 3 000m, 1 500m and 800m races."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He then advanced to represent the Sarah Baartman District in Queenstown last weekend, where he continued his winning streak.","html":"He then advanced to represent the Sarah Baartman District in Queenstown last weekend, where he continued his winning streak."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Friday and Saturday, he claimed the first place in the 1 500m and 800m.","html":"On Friday and Saturday, he claimed the first place in the 1 500m and 800m."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Sunday, he won the 3 000m in a time of 08:53, followed by another first place finish in the 1 500m final with a time of 04:11.","html":"On Sunday, he won the 3 000m in a time of 08:53, followed by another first place finish in the 1 500m final with a time of 04:11."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He also competed in the 800m final, finishing sixth with a time of 02:20.","html":"He also competed in the 800m final, finishing sixth with a time of 02:20."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jola is coached by his father, Luthando Sikiwe, who also trains the athletics team at Gcinubuzwe Combined.","html":"Jola is coached by his father, Luthando Sikiwe, who also trains the athletics team at Gcinubuzwe Combined."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The school principal, Vuyolwethu Mbune, expressed immense pride in Jola’s achievements.","html":"The school principal, Vuyolwethu Mbune, expressed immense pride in Jola’s achievements."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Only two quintile 3 schools in the Sarah Baartman District have qualified for the national championships, making Jola’s success even more remarkable.","html":"Only two quintile 3 schools in the Sarah Baartman District have qualified for the national championships, making Jola’s success even more remarkable."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The school and community are now actively fundraising to ensure that Sikiwe can travel with Jola to the nationals.","html":"The school and community are now actively fundraising to ensure that Sikiwe can travel with Jola to the nationals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They are behind him 100% and hoping that he will continue his outstanding performances and make his mark on the national stage.","html":"They are behind him 100% and hoping that he will continue his outstanding performances and make his mark on the national stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
